description: ReSeP-lite + ActivFORMS-lite reference implementation for the architectural experiment.

fault_injection.notes: Each atomic service's preInvokeOperation hook draws a Bernoulli with p=err from the profile to inject a failure.

notes: Six-step experiment matches Table IV of [1]: 500-invocation runs over baseline/s1/s2/aggregate. Acceptance: reproduce baseline ≈ 0.18 fail rate, s1 ≈ 0.11, s2 ≈ 0.00.
